text:
Value Description 
Deceased Patient is deceased 
Initial diagnosis Treatment of the disease has started, and the disease has not been re-evaluated since 
treatment began 
Local or regional 
recurrence/Relapse Recurrence is the local or regional return of a solid tumor cancer after a clinically 
disease-free interval. Relapse is the return of a leukemia, lymphoma, or other 
hematopoietic malignancy that was not previously clinically apparent or symptomatic 
Metastasis Evidence of cancer in a
